prompt.content:
Calculate using the model the total enterprise value (TEV) using the terminal value – growth in perpetuity approach for S&P Global (consolidated entity) under the following assumptions:
•	Set the interest rate for the Senior Notes due 2030 equal to the 1‑month U.S. Treasury yield as of December 31, 2025 plus a 0.5% pricing spread.
•	Set the interest rate for the Senior Notes due 2032 equal to the 1‑month U.S. Treasury yield as of December 31, 2025 plus a 1.0% pricing spread.
•	Set the interest rate for the Senior Notes due 2033 equal to the 1‑month U.S. Treasury yield as of December 31, 2025 plus a 1.25% pricing spread.
•	Set the interest rate for the Senior Notes due 2037 equal to the 1‑month U.S. Treasury yield as of December 31, 2025 plus a 1.5% pricing spread.
•	Apply mid year convention

Present the result in USD millions, rounded to the nearest dollar.

rubrics.name: States that Total Enterprise value (EV) - growth in perpetuity approach is... (ver_0e5828bc146f4c4ab7c6e1f228f709ff)

messages.content: States that Total Enterprise value (EV) - growth in perpetuity approach is $140,400 million (acceptable range $138,996 to $141,804).

golden_responses.golden_text_response: Total Enterprise value (EV) - growth in perpetuity approach is $140,400 million
